## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Test plan

- what you ran
- what you did not run

## Risk

- user-facing risk
- operational risk
- rollback plan if relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] changelog updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] no sensitive values added to logs, summaries, or tool output
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
